=======================================================================
USB Protocol Switching & PTP Session — Decompilation (3-level depth)
Firmware: Canon IXUS 870 IS / SD880 IS, version 1.01a
Generated by DecompileUSBProtocol.java (Ghidra headless)
Focus: ChangeUSBProtocol, add_ptp_handler, task_PTPSessionTASK
=======================================================================

KEY QUESTIONS:
1. Does ChangeUSBProtocol trigger USB re-enumeration (soft disconnect/reconnect)?
2. Are USB descriptors copied to RAM (modifiable) or served from ROM?
3. How are PTP handlers registered? Can we add custom UVC handlers?
4. What is the PTP session lifecycle?
